knowledge_notes.title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B GB10 retained DFlash long-context benchmark
knowledge_notes.content:
Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on gb10-4t: final retained DFlash configuration benchmark summary.

Evidence: artifacts/knowledge/qwen3.6-gb10-dflash-final-context-sweep-results.json and artifacts/knowledge/qwen3.6-gb10-dflash-final-context-sweep-findings-2026-04-23.md.

Benchmark shape: AIMA benchmark.run, concurrency=1, requests=1, rounds=3, warmup=2, output_tokens=512, input targets 1K/2K/4K/8K/16K/32K/64K/128K/256K. All 9 buckets completed successfully.

Retained DFlash runtime: qujing/vllm-gb10-dflash-fa2:latest, max_model_len=262144, gpu_memory_utilization=0.92, block_size=1280, max_num_batched_tokens=8192, max_num_seqs=1, async_scheduling=false, FLASH_ATTN, num_speculative_tokens=10, no MoE tuned config. Required env: VLLM_KV_CACHE_LAYOUT=NHD, VLLM_SKIP_GDN_PREFILL_WARMUP=1, FLA_GDN_FIX_BT=1, VLLM_MEMORY_PROFILER_ESTIMATE_CUDAGRAPHS=1.

Key measured points: 32K actual_prompt=29149 TTFT=5.932s TPOT=29.363ms decode=34.1 tok/s end_to_end=24.679 tok/s acceptance=26.3%; 64K actual_prompt=58277 TTFT=13.749s TPOT=38.113ms decode=26.2 tok/s end_to_end=15.220 tok/s acceptance=23.3%; 128K actual_prompt=116532 TTFT=35.169s TPOT=50.205ms decode=19.9 tok/s end_to_end=8.380 tok/s acceptance=23.4%; 256K actual_prompt=233039 TTFT=109.196s TPOT=74.197ms decode=13.5 tok/s end_to_end=3.482 tok/s acceptance=25.0%.

Comparison: versus baseline BF16 knowledge, DFlash end-to-end TPS is about +43% at 32K, +44% at 64K, +74% at 128K, and +68% at 256K. At 128K/256K the gain is mostly from TTFT/prefill; decode TPS is already below baseline, so do not describe this as a general 500%-600% acceleration. Versus native MTP, DFlash is stronger at 32K/64K/128K by about +29%/+67%/+72% end-to-end TPS.

Recommendation: use this as the current GB10 retained DFlash reference for Qwen3.6-35B-A3B long-context single-stream serving. Keep MoE tuned configs as experiment-only unless a future run improves both 32K and 64K practical 1K-output metrics without hurting TPOT.
